description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure with arms crossed over the knees, rendered in a classical style reminiscent of ancient Egyptian statuary. The figure wears a headdress that drapes down the sides of the head and over the shoulders, and the facial features are calm and symmetrical. The body is positioned upright, with the knees drawn up and feet flat on a rectangular base. The surface of the sculpture appears weathered, with visible texture and some discoloration, suggesting it is made from stone or a similar material. The back of the figure is rounded, and there is a notable hollow or cavity at the lower back area. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with no visible separable parts or interactive elements.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a seated human figure with crossed arms and a draped headdress, set on a rectangular base. The style is classical and monolithic, with detailed facial features and a textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, crossed arms, and both feet resting on the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped headdress, and the curvature of the back.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the rounded back, the headdress from behind, and a hollow cavity at the lower back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, arm position, and the base.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with crossed arms and headdress
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
